title: RurAL CAP names new Chief Financial Officer
summary: Rural Alaska Community Action Program, Inc., (RurAL CAP), a statewide nonprofit, named Selena Bailey Chief Financial Officer (CFO). title: SNC Board of Trustees Announces 2023 Heritage and Elder Distributions
summary: November 3, 2023 The Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Board of Trustees is pleased to declare a Heritage Trust Distribution of $10.50 per Trust Unit (or $1,050 for those with 100 Trust Units) to all Beneficiaries of record as of November 2, 2023. title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: November 2, 2023
summary: November 2 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase at a significant rate of 11.68% (about equal with last week’s rate), from the level on 10/26/2023 of 7.749 M km 2 to 8.774 M km 2 for this week. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 30 October, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 30 October, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Ahtna Announces Second Shareholder and Elder Dividend Distributions for 2023
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – In April, the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust agreed to provide two dividend distributions per year.
